entity.name: Aiden Yoon
entity.description: Solo developer and maintainer of DepSentinel, an AI-powered dependency-security GitHub Action.

projects.name: DepSentinel
projects.description: An AI maintainer that scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities (via OSV.dev), explains each one's real-world impact in plain language, and opens merge-ready upgrade PRs. Distributed as a reusable GitHub Action; works for free without an API key. Helps maintainers cope with AI-scale vulnerability triage across the open-source supply chain.

plans.name: Monthly supporter
plans.description: Supports ongoing maintenance and new ecosystem support (PyPI, Go, crates.io).

plans.name: Development grant
plans.description: One-time grant funding to build call-site reachability analysis and expand beyond npm to additional package ecosystems.
